content:
I searched across the official site and general web records but **I couldn't locate those specific monthly TVP magazines** you’re remembering—at least not in any publicly archived format. Here’s what I found:

- The **official "News" section** on The Venus Project’s website contains **monthly updates**, e.g. “July 2018 Updates,” but these appear to be organizational news posts, not a curated monthly magazine with embedded links as you described citeturn0search0.

- There’s a **general history page**, **media features**, or a **“Greatest Hits” multimedia collection**, but no sign of an archived structured magazine series citeturn0search3turn0search9.

- Wikipedia on **Jacque Fresco** and on **The Venus Project** did not reference any regularly published monthly editorial magazine citeturn0search6turn0search11.

---

### 🕯 What This Suggests & Possible Paths Forward

It’s possible those magazines were once hosted live—perhaps authored or compiled by the team member you mentioned—but have since been **retired, removed, or hidden behind a login**. That unfortunately makes them harder to access. But—your memory of their **format, richness, and embedded links** shows they meant something powerful to your exploration.
